criteria.label: Describe the four-step boosting loop (init, residuals, fit tree, update) in your own words.
criteria.example: Write: 'Start at mean(y); compute r = y − F; fit depth-1 tree to r; set F = F + 0.1 * tree(x); repeat.'

criteria.label: Implement one manual boosting round on toy data with NumPy and a shallow DecisionTreeRegressor.
criteria.example: On 5 points, show F before/after one round with eta=0.3 and print residuals shrinking.

criteria.label: Explain why pseudo-residuals for MSE equal y − F(x) but log-loss targets differ.
criteria.example: One paragraph: MSE gradient w.r.t. F is 2(F−y), so tree targets point toward y; log-loss gradient involves predicted probability minus label.

criteria.label: Tune learning_rate and n_estimators with validation early stopping on a tabular dataset.
criteria.example: Report best (η, n_estimators) by validation AUC; include a note that η=0.05 with 400 trees beat η=0.3 with 100 trees.
